findings.description: The JDBC standard SQL example showing `?` placeholder syntax is omitted. The source explicitly presents both the JDBC standard form (`VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`) and the named-variable form as a side-by-side comparison introduced by 'JDBCの標準機能を使用した場合のSQL文の記述例'. An AI answering questions about how this feature differs from standard JDBC would lack the contrasting example.
findings.source_evidence:
-- JDBC標準機能の場合

INSERT INTO USER_MTR
VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)

findings.description: Section s2's title is set to the full document title 'オブジェクトのフィールドの値のデータベースへの登録機能(オブジェクトのフィールド値を使用した検索機能)' but the corresponding source heading is the h2 'クラス図'. The title should reflect the actual section heading.
